title: Column Number - DON'T Round Numbers

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community!

I use the column number show the exchange rate of the day (USD to BRL), but the column automatically round it up. This is leading to a misreading on the values for other users.

Is there any way to disable this automatic round number?

Here’s an example:

Writing the exchange rate from US Dollar to Brazilian Real:

After Typed the number it rounds up:

I really don’t want to convert the column into a text column. The plan on the future is to use the column related with a formula.
